hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(src|server|api|routes|models|config|docker|infra)/.*\.(js|ts|json|yml|yaml|md|sql)$|package\.json|Dockerfile|docker-compose|\.env|CLAUDE'; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') - Modified: $file" >> /opt/HIVEMIND/journal.md; fi 2>/dev/null || true
